message:
refactor(api): extract sendGatewayError to shared response utility

- Add sendGatewayError to response.ts for consistent GatewayError handling
- Update cass.ts to use centralized function instead of local duplicate
- Remove redundant serializeGatewayError and ContentfulStatusCode imports

This pattern can be applied to memory.ts, knowledge.ts, beads.ts, and
mail.ts which have identical respondWithGatewayError implementations.

bd-1hxe7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
